reviewer: OpenAI coding agent, at the user's explicit request
scope: Native deterministic cookbook renders for all three documentation-only brand-inspired public StyleSpec prototypes; reviewed for readable labels, contained geometry, visible semantic binding/cue effects, and consistency with the stated non-endorsement/non-equivalence boundaries.
limitations: These are static documentation prototypes, not built-in Looks, BrandPacks, endorsements, proprietary-asset reproductions, or exhaustive design-system equivalence claims.
